rulings.Case Title: SUCHIN, INC. D.B.A. THE WORTH HOTEL VS. PETER YIP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion That: 1) Matters Be Deemed Admitted 2) For Order Compelling Responses To Discovery (Ccp 2030.290(B), 2031.300(B)) And 3) For Sanctions (Ccp 2023.030, 2030.290)
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 10, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF SUCHIN, INC.'s Motion That: 1) Matters Be Deemed Admitted 2) For Order Compelling Responses To Discovery (Ccp 2030.290(B), 2031.300(B)) And 3) For Sanctions (Ccp 2023.030, 2030.290) GRANTED, subject to opposition as follows: (1) Defendant shall provide responses by personal service to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for production within 5 days of notice of entry of order; (2) Requests for Admissions are Deemed Admitted; (3) Defendant shall pay $930 to Plaintiff's attorney within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Prevailing Party to Prepare Order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AWS LLC VS. ANH LAN VOUNG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 10, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT HOA TRINH's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED. No opposition filed. Hoa Kim Trinh shall file answer no later than October 11, 2013 by 4 p.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TOM LEUNG VS. BOLESLAW SIKORSKI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 10, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT BOLESLAW SIKORSKI and JOLANTA SIKORSKI's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to amend to allege daily damages starting after the expiration of Notice. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 676 GEARY STREET, LLC VS. JUSTIN CRANDALL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 10, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT JUSTIN CRANDALL's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED subject to (1) opposition; (2) Defendant posting $2,304 with the Court no later than October 11, 2013 by 4 p.m.; and (3) filing answer no later than October 11, 2013 by 4 p.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANA MARIA TELLEZ MORENO VS. RICARDO OJEDA
